title: p5.js Architecture and Execution Model
description: Interactive p5.js visualization for p5.js architecture and execution model
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: educational technology
data visualization
p5.js
learningObjectives: Explain why setup() executes exactly once while draw() loops continuously at approximately 60 frames per second
Trace the execution order of a p5.js sketch from library load through setup() into the repeating draw() cycle
Describe how event handlers such as mousePressed() and keyPressed() run between draw() frames in response to user input
Decide whether a given piece of sketch code belongs in setup() (one-time initialization) or draw() (per-frame animation)
